login_description: Use your email and password to continue into the dashboard.
login_error_required: Enter both your email and password before continuing.
login_error_generic: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
auth_layout_title: A cleaner authentication flow for the projects built on this base.
auth_layout_description: This starter now ships with a real login form, route-aware redirection, query-backed auth state, and a testable feature boundary instead of a one-click demo button.
dashboard_description: This is a simple post-login screen. You can use it as the starting point for your authenticated app flow.
dashboard_next_step_value: Add your first protected feature here
profile_description: This page is available for authenticated users and admins. It is useful for testing role-based guards that should allow both roles.
admin_description: Only users with the admin role can enter this page. Non-admin users should be redirected to the forbidden screen.
admin_scope_value: Admin tools, settings, and privileged operations
error_not_found_description: It seems like the page you're looking for does not exist or might have been removed.
error_forbidden_description: You don't have the necessary permission to view this resource.
error_general_description: We apologize for the inconvenience. Please try again later.
error_maintenance_description: The site is not available at the moment. We'll be back online shortly.
